name: journalism_ransomware_incident_forces_cedar_tru_loy
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: journalism ransomware incident forces cedar tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Two upstream teams have published contradictory status pages; customers are comparing timestamps. The vendor bridge ends at the top of the hour; after that, configuration changes require a full CAB and you lose the window. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident.

agents.name: Mateo Morales
agents.identity: I am Mateo Morales, the accountable decision-maker on this Journalism bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Kaito Navarro
agents.identity: I am Kaito Navarro, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Mateo Morales must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Mateo Morales do?
